traits.name: Fire Form
traits.text: The phoenix can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing. Any creature that touches the phoenix or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (1d10) fire damage. In addition, the phoenix can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. The first time it enters a creature's space on a turn, that creature takes 5 (1d10) fire damage. With a touch, the phoenix can also ignite flammable objects that aren't worn or carried (no action required).

traits.name: Flyby
traits.text: The phoenix doesn't provoke opportunity attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

traits.name: Illumination
traits.text: The phoenix sheds bright light in a 60-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.text: If the phoenix fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Siege Monster
traits.text: The phoenix deals double damage to objects and structures.
